name: Boot-Up Admiral - Destroyer Dynamo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>提</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>督</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>デストロイリボルバー
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 2 "Gadget" Monster Cards from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY. Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects while you control a "Gadget" monster or a "Gadget" Monster Card equipped to a monster. Once per turn: You can target 1 other card on the field; destroy it.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 2 "Gadget" Monster Cards from your hand and/or face-up field to the GY. Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects while you control a "Gadget" monster or a "Gadget" Monster Card equipped to a monster. Once per turn: You can target 1 other card on the field; destroy it.
